forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 64. Southwest wind around 6 mph.

forecast.name: Monday

weather_report:
As we drift through the tranquil embrace of the night in Boston, a gentle warmth lingers in the air, hinting at the balmy summer that awaits with the dawn. The sky, mostly clear with only a few flickers of distant stars, promises a low of about 64, welcoming the soft whispers of a southwestern breeze. Such hours seem perfect for reflection or perhaps a leisurely stroll along the waterfront, where the rhythmic lapping of the waves could soothe any weariness from the day.

By morning, Boston will greet the sun with open arms, basking in rays that will warm the city to around 89 degrees. The day holds the potential for brilliance, marked by azure skies and bright sunlight. For those venturing out, light, breathable clothing will be your best companion, allowing for comfort amid the rise of the sun's fiery embrace. An afternoon spent in the Boston Common offers a splendid chance to soak in the day; perhaps enjoy a book under a leafy tree, or sip on a refreshing iced beverage at one of the nearby cafes, where the conversations are as smooth as the gentle breeze. In this splendid weather, even the mundane can become sublime.
